query: I need assistance with planning a week-long trip for three people, starting from Punta Gorda and traveling to three different cities in Michigan. The trip dates are from March 6th to March 12th, 2022, and our new budget is set at $4,400. For dining, we'd like to try local American and French cuisines.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Punta Gorda to Pellston, duration: 21 hours 40 mins, distance: 2,457 km, cost: 122

plan.attraction: Pellston Pioneer Park; Philip J. Braun Nature Preserve; Headlands International Dark Sky Park;
plan.accommodation: Airy and bright room. Prospect Park, Pellston

plan.attraction: Colonial Michilimackinac; Conkling Heritage Park; McGulpin Point Lighthouse;
plan.accommodation: Airy and bright room. Prospect Park, Pellston

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Pellston to Traverse City, duration: 1 hour 49 mins, distance: 137 km, cost: 6

plan.attraction: Clinch Park; Great Lakes Children's Museum; Mission Point Lighthouse;
plan.accommodation: Convenient Financial District Studio, Traverse City

plan.attraction: Pirate's Cove Adventure Park; Discovery Pier; Historic Barns Park;
plan.accommodation: Convenient Financial District Studio, Traverse City

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Traverse City to Alpena, duration: 2 hours 29 mins, distance: 204 km, cost: 10
